
> dinkmatch@0.0.1 test
> vitest run

[22m[39m[enforceOneMatchPerCourt] Removed 1 conflicting match(es) from courts, returned players to queue

 [31mΓ¥»[39m src/services/matchmaking.spec.ts [2m([22m[2m64 tests[22m[2m | [22m[31m4 failed[39m[2m)[22m[32m 47[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m winners gain and losers lose (zero-sum)[32m 2[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m blowout moves ratings more than a close game[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m big upset: underdogs gain large; favorites lose large (zero-sum)[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m mixed team win: low-rated partner gets more credit than high-rated partner[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
[31m     [31m├ù[31m mixed team loss: soft underdog means higher-rated partner pays more, but not much more[39m[32m 6[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m per-player swing: singles (K=24) equals doubles per-player (K=48 split by 2)[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m floor hit: rating clamps at 100, never negative[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m CSV Match 6: Shirwin+James vs Peejay+Eddie 11-4[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
[31m     [31m├ù[31m CSV Match 18: Dimple+Luv vs Rommel+Abbey 11-1 upset[39m[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
[31m     [31m├ù[31m CSV Match 28: Peejay+Shirwin vs Jayson+Trin 11-2 upset[39m[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m CSV Match 10: Jayson+Trin vs Henri+Celine 11-2[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
[31m     [31m├ù[31m anti-carry: weak partner in huge gap pair gets less credit than before, but still more than strong partner[39m[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m a removed player (tombstone on server) does NOT resurrect from a stale live local copy[32m 2[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m the deletion tombstone is RETAINED in the merged state so it propagates durably[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m an intentional re-queue (newer queuedAt) DOES override an older tombstone[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m a cancelled match (tombstone on server) does NOT resurrect from a stale live local copy[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m a completed match does not resurrect from stale admin because completedMatches guard re-tombstones it[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m a cancelled match tombstone does NOT pull players out of the queue[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m concurrent add of same user in different queueTypes yields one live entry[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m add-then-remove across admins: later removal wins[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m remove-then-add across admins: later add wins[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m clock-skew guard: stale live entry with high updatedAt but old queuedAt does not beat newer tombstone[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m enteredAt=0 sentinel (fairness_first) is not purged by checkpoint logic[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m clear-queue tombstones propagate and stale live entries do not resurrect[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m queue XOR match: a player placed in a match on B is removed from queue on A[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m concurrent distinct matches with disjoint players both survive[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m same player in two concurrent matches keeps only one; other players return to queue[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m completed match on server wins over in-progress stale copy; ratings are not re-applied[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m match created offline on A + different match completed on B both survive[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m match reset checkpoint purges old matches; tombstoned-after-reset survives[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m player delete vs edit: later deletion wins, but fresher stats are overlaid[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m player delete propagates over a stale live copy with high updatedAt[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m player re-add after deletion beats a stale tombstone[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m player re-add with old addedAt still loses to a newer deletion[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m concurrent rating change: higher ratingUpdatedAt wins[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m concurrent stats change: higher statsUpdatedAt wins[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m per-field independence: avatar edit does not clobber fresher stats[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m player reset checkpoint purges old players; tombstoned/statted-after-reset survive[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m local full reset (newer empty state) overwrites server[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m remote full reset (newer empty server) is adopted[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m partial session reset via checkpoints carries across admins[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m pre-reset stale offline data is purged; post-reset data survives[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m completedMatches epoch reset drops old completed matches[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m merging is order-independent for disjoint edits (commutative on normalized live state)[32m 9[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m merging is idempotent: re-merging the same state reaches a fixed point[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m three-admin offline divergence converges after pairwise exchanges[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m full lifecycle split across two admins converges and satisfies invariants[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m repeated re-merges do not oscillate between tombstone and live (stability)[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m merging is associative: merge(merge(a,b),c) equals merge(a,merge(b,c))[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m double-completion of same match keeps one completed record and does not double-apply stats[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m match tombstone beats stale live copy even with high updatedAt clock skew[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m live-vs-live same match uses updatedAt LWW (documented limitation)[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m Clear Matches: tombstones are retained and no stale live match resurrects[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m Clear Queue: cleared players do not resurrect from stale admin[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m Reset Session: checkpoint purge + stat reset propagate over stale offline data[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m Reset Session: post-reset offline add survives while pre-reset entries are purged[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m Reset All: newer empty state overwrites stale admin data[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m Reset All: re-merging stale admin does not resurrect data after adoption[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m settings LWW: higher settingsUpdatedAt wins as a block[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m queue ordering and priority is preserved after merge[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m reset checkpoint boundary: pre-checkpoint entries purged, post-checkpoint entries survive[32m 2[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m enforceOneMatchPerCourtOnState keeps newest startedAt and requeues losers[32m 1[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m enforceOneMatchPerCourtOnState requeues players only in the losing match[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
     [32mΓ£ô[39m gcTombstones removes only tombstones older than 7 days[32m 0[2mms[22m[39m
